name: Flowgate Automation - User Sync Pipeline
description: Production-grade ETL pipeline: fetch users from external API, filter by email domain (.net/.org), transform to CRM schema, and POST to webhook with retry + batching.

nodes.name: Buscar Usuários (GET)
nodes.notes: Fetches user list from external API. Retries up to 5x with 5s backoff.

nodes.name: Filtrar Domínios
nodes.notes: Keeps only users with .net or .org emails.

nodes.name: Transformar para Schema Boa Vista
nodes.notes: Transforms user data into CRM schema. Adds correlationId for tracing.

nodes.name: Cadastrar Usuário (POST)
nodes.notes: POSTs each user to CRM. Batching (1 req/2s) prevents rate limits. Partial failures don't stop the pipeline.

nodes.name: Retornar Sumário de Execução
nodes.notes: Returns execution summary to the webhook caller.
